entry.title: Fine-grained Text-to-Image Control with Sparse Diffusion Plans
entry.summary: We introduce a text-to-image generation framework that decomposes prompts into sparse diffusion plans for controllable image synthesis and improved semantic fidelity.

entry.title: Long-Horizon Text-to-Video Generation with Memory-Conditioned World Models
entry.summary: We present a text-to-video model that uses a memory-conditioned world model to improve long-horizon coherence, camera consistency, and controllable video generation.

entry.title: Planner-Toolformer Agents for Reliable Web Task Completion
entry.summary: We study agentic AI systems that combine planning and tool use to improve reliable completion on realistic web agent tasks with better error recovery.
